trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 68.2 in the bullish momentum zone (not overbought), MACD crossover with rising histogram, and price 12% above SMA-20 — strongest risk/reward on the screener with $598 cash available.

decisions.briefing: Markets dipped mildly today (-0.4% on both NASDAQ and S&P 500), a neutral session with no clear directional catalyst. Portfolio holds 5 positions with 5 slots still open and $598 in cash — the rules call for deploying that. ACHC stands out as the top pick: score 95, RSI in the sweet spot at 68.2 (bullish but not overbought), and MACD confirming momentum. AMZN is slightly below our avg cost ($271 vs $274) but well clear of the -7% stop-loss, so no action needed there.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged lower Monday with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ falling 0.4%, reflecting a cautious tone as investors digested mixed signals on trade policy and awaited fresh earnings guidance. No single headline dominated; instead, the mild pullback reflected routine profit-taking after a strong multi-week rally. Defensive positioning ahead of the week's economic data releases kept buyers on the sidelines.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週一小幅走低，標普500指數與納斯達克指數均下跌0.4%，市場情緒審慎。投資者在消化貿易政策的混雜信號之餘，也靜待本週即將公布的企業財測與經濟數據。在經歷數週強勁反彈後，市場進入正常的獲利了結階段，買盤動能暫時退潮，整體呈現中性格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI measures how fast and how much a stock's price has moved recently, on a scale of 0 to 100. A reading between 55 and 70 is the 'momentum sweet spot' — the stock is trending upward with conviction, but hasn't yet entered overbought territory (above 70) where a pullback becomes more likely. ACHC's RSI of 68.2 sits right in that zone, which is why it ranks as today's top buy.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）衡量股價近期漲跌的速度與幅度，數值介於0至100之間。RSI在55至70之間被視為「動能甜蜜區」——代表股票正處於上升趨勢且動能充足，但尚未進入超買區間（70以上），不至於立即面臨回調壓力。ACHC目前RSI為68.2，正落在此區間，是今日評分最高的買入標的之一。
